response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks entry-level alignment: Java is only listed as a skill without project context, German is only basic (not fluent as required), and the resume portrays a senior full-stack engineer with no evidence of agile insurance-sector projects or junior role readiness.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication through workshops
Demonstrated expertise in CI/CD, testing, and DevOps practices
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, failing the core requirement
No evidence of Java usage in professional projects or insurance-sector context
Overqualified and senior-level background suggests misalignment with entry-level role
